## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly leadership meeting to discuss hiring progress, operational updates, and strategic concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant hiring momentum with several key roles filled and offers accepted](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Concerns raised about content quality, client expectations, and results delivery timelines](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Need to refine onboarding processes and knowledge transfer for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Discussions on contractor vs. FTE status and benefits policies for international team members](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)

## Topics

### Hiring Progress

  - [Multiple offers accepted, including Jason (hybrid DTM/Managing Director role)](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [New hires: Kirkland, Merritt, Jacob, Dave; offer out to KT (managing editor)](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Verbal agreement with Franco (ex-Backlinko SEO lead)](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Potential hire: Matthew (former TechCrunch editor-in-chief) for editorial oversight](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)

### Operational Challenges

  - [Content quality issues persist, partly due to workflow complexities in AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Daniel plans to focus on improving content production workflows this week](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Bridget working on headcount and burn rate models, improving Adio data utilization](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

### Client Management and Results

  - [Concerns about meeting client expectations for results and speed](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=2490.0)
  - [Need to refine ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) and learn to say no to unsuitable clients](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=2565.0)
  - [Discussion on replicating success stories like Deep Crap and Steadily for newer accounts](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=2501.0)

### Product and Training Strategy

  - [Debate on how to teach SEO principles without exposing internal tools (e.g., AirOps)](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=2779.0)
  - [Suggestion to create open-source framework with premium features for growth hackers](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=3142.0)
  - [Need for balance between customization and scalability in client solutions](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=3031.0)

### HR and Benefits

  - [Discussion on FTE vs. contractor status for international employees](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=3204.0)
  - [Need to develop consistent policies for benefits, parental leave, and vacation time](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=3527.0)
  - [Consideration of legal and financial implications of different employment structures](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=3541.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to finalize headcount and burn rate models](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Daniel to focus on improving content production workflows](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Develop onboarding plan with recorded sessions from leadership team](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Marcel and Bridget to draft policies for employment status, benefits, and leave](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=3541.0)
  - [Continue aggressive recruiting and hiring efforts](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Prepare for upcoming all-hands meeting and Series A preparations](https://fathom.video/share/3TrrQ-mBWN2k77SCejrc5gKCbMxcVmdG?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
